case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. TANYIT MERCEDES PARADA GARCIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-22-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JHONATAN HERRADA LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT TANYIT MERCEDES PARADA GARCIA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, TANYIT MERCEDES PARADA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, TANYIT MERCEDES PARADA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-21-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, TANYIT MERCEDES PARADA
